ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user input */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the input */,
  "input_sentence" TEXT /* The natural language input sentence provided by the user */,
  "input_date" TEXT /* Date when the input was provided */,
  "input_time" TEXT /* Time when the input was provided */,
  "input_language" TEXT /* Language in which the input was provided */,
  "input_context" TEXT /* Additional context or metadata about the input (e.g., device, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intent_recognition" (
  "intent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intent recognition event */,
  "input_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user input associated with the intent */,
  "intent_recognized" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if an intent was recognized */,
  "intent_score" REAL /* Score of the recognized intent */,
  "intent_type" TEXT /* Type of the recognized intent (e.g., book flight, reserve hotel) */,
  "intent_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the recognized intent */,
  "intent_version" TEXT /* Version of the NLP model used for intent recognition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intent_recognition_input_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_id") REFERENCES user_inputs ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intent_recognition_intent_type FOREIGN KEY ("intent_type") REFERENCES intent_types ("intent_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "spellcheck" (
  "spellcheck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spellchecking event */,
  "input_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user input associated with the spellchecking */,
  "spellchecked_sentence" TEXT /* The spellchecked version of the input sentence */,
  "spelling_errors" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if there were spelling errors */,
  "luis_spellcheck" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if LUIS spellcheck was used */,
  "spellcheck_version" TEXT /* Version of the spellcheck model used */,
  "corrections_applied" INTEGER /* Number of corrections applied to the input sentence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spellcheck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spellcheck_input_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_id") REFERENCES user_inputs ("input_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extracted entity */,
  "input_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user input associated with the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the extracted entity (e.g., budget, date, city) */,
  "entity_value" TEXT /* Value of the extracted entity */,
  "number_entities" INTEGER /* Number of entities extracted from the input */,
  "entity_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the extracted entity */,
  "entity_version" TEXT /* Version of the NLP model used for entity extraction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_entity_type FOREIGN KEY ("entity_type") REFERENCES entity_types ("entity_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_input_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_id") REFERENCES user_inputs ("input_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_details" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel detail entry */,
  "input_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user input associated with the travel details */,
  "origin_city" TEXT /* City of origin for the travel */,
  "destination_city" TEXT /* City of destination for the travel */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget for the travel */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the travel */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the travel */,
  "number_children" INTEGER /* Number of children traveling */,
  "number_adults" INTEGER /* Number of adults traveling */,
  "number_of_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms required (for hotel bookings) */,
  "travel_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the travel (e.g., business, leisure) */,
  "travel_class" TEXT /* Class of travel (e.g., economy, business, first) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_details_budget FOREIGN KEY ("budget") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_details_input_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_id") REFERENCES user_inputs ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_details_origin_city FOREIGN KEY ("origin_city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_details_destination_city FOREIGN KEY ("destination_city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., traveler, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intent_types" (
  "intent_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intent type */,
  "intent_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the intent type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intent type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the intent type (e.g., booking, query) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intent_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_types" (
  "entity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity type */,
  "entity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the entity type (e.g., financial, date) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., JPY, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Currency symbol (e.g., ¥, €) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the preference */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of the preference (e.g., currency, language) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "preference_version" TEXT /* Version of the preference setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the history entry */,
  "input_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user input associated with the history entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., intent recognized, booking confirmed) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Time of the action */,
  "action_version" TEXT /* Version of the NLP model used for the action */,
  "action_context" TEXT /* Additional context or metadata about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_history_input_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_id") REFERENCES user_inputs ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "input_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user input associated with the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "feedback_time" TEXT /* Time of the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (1-5) */,
  "feedback_version" TEXT /* Version of the NLP model used for the feedback */,
  "feedback_context" TEXT /* Additional context or metadata about the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_input_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_id") REFERENCES user_inputs ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
